description_long: This object is a highly simplified and stylized representation of an airplane, featuring a long, slender fuselage with a pointed nose and a single, straight wing extending perpendicularly from the center. The wing appears to be mid-mounted and is accompanied by a vertical stabilizer at the rear, as well as a horizontal stabilizer, forming a classic tail assembly. The fuselage is colored in a light wood tone, while the wing and tail surfaces are rendered in black, giving a stark contrast. There are no visible windows, cockpit details, or engine nacelles, and the landing gear is not apparent. The overall design is minimalistic, with no surface textures or intricate features, suggesting a model or toy rather than a functional aircraft.
description: A minimalistic airplane with a long wooden fuselage and black straight wings and tail, lacking visible cockpit or engine details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central black wing, and vertical stabilizer, with the fuselage appearing as a thin vertical line.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme slenderness of the fuselage and the flat, straight wing extending horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail assembly, with the vertical and horizontal stabilizers visible, and the fuselage as a thin line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the long fuselage and the flat wing profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wing with no visible dihedral or winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
